description: You are a Senior Database Developer tasked with fixing three broken stored procedures in the Sakila database that are causing nightly reports to fail. Using the local server (user: ga, password: password123), resolve the ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY error (Error 1055) in 'sp_report_sales_by_category' and export the results to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/sales_by_category.csv'. Correct the logic in 'sp_identify_dead_inventory' to identify inventory items that have never been rented and export the results to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/dead_inventory.csv'. Fix 'sp_calculate_customer_credit' by adding the missing 'credit_score' INT column to the 'customer' table, then export the top 20 customers by credit score to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/top_credit_customers.csv'.
